name: Standard Start
description: A balanced beginning. Your station is modestly equipped and crewed by a capable team. The sector holds the usual mix of opportunity and threat.

name: Derelict Salvage
description: You have claimed a battered hulk drifting at the sector edge. Crew is thin, resources are lean, and the neighbours are watching. Survival first.

name: Military Outpost
description: Commissioned to hold a strategic position. Your crew is security-heavy and well-stocked, but resupply is infrequent and one faction already watches your arrival with suspicion.
